aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks depth in content, user engagement, and structured data utilization.
quick_wins: Expand and diversify content to cover more specific services and long-tail keywords.
Implement a review generation strategy to build Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews.
Enhance metadata and header tags to better align with targeted search queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was found, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing GBP listing prevents the business from appearing in local map packs.
Lack of GBP means no customer reviews or business insights are available.

nap_citations.summary: NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations are inconsistent or missing across major directories.
action_items: Claim and verify the business on major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms and listings.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and structured data to enhance search engine understanding.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for localized commercial services in Gilbert, Arizona.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement LocalBusiness schema and add location-based keywords throughout the site.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop content that showcases expertise in commercial HVAC and related services, potentially through blog posts or case studies.

page_title: Commercial HVAC Gilbert AZ | Elite Pro Services
